title: K-200 GCS Subsystem Specification
text:
# K-200 GCS Subsystem Specification

Document number: MD-DOC-456-F. Revision: F. Type: specification. Author: Tobias Wren. Created: 2024-01-02. Last modified: 2024-03-16. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the GCS subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1003, P-1095, P-1052, P-1075.
